updateCouponUsage(int) - Method in class Model.CouponDAO
Increments the usage count of a coupon.
updatePaymentStatus(String, String, Timestamp) - Method in class Model.PaymentDAO
Updates payment status by transaction reference (often used in callbacks from payment gateways).
updateProfile(UserProfile) - Method in class Model.UserDAO
Updates profile details of a user.
